since_last: 17% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 17% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -2.55% · Gold -1.21% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 17% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.50%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.50%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -8.08%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +3.23%, SAP +2.64%, WDAY +1.61%, NOW +1.29%, ADBE +0.99%. Laggards: MU -8.08%, CEVA -7.66%, MRVL -7.42%, ASML -6.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.36% at $149.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
